c74object.name: tap.fft.list~
c74object.digest: Output FFT frames as Max lists
c74object.description: Output FFT frames as Max lists.

objarg.name: framesize
objarg.digest: The number of bins in each FFT frame
objarg.description: The number of bins in each FFT frame.

attribute.name: mult
attribute.digest: Factor by which to multiply values
attribute.description: Factor by which to multiply values.

attribute.name: nyquist
attribute.digest: Limit output list to run from zero to the nyquist frequency
attribute.description: Limit output list to run from zero to the nyquist frequency.

attribute.name: autopoll
attribute.digest: automatically output any time a new frame is complete
attribute.description: automatically output any time a new frame is complete.

attribute.name: framesize
attribute.digest: Number of bins in the FFT
attribute.description: Number of bins in the FFT.
